title: Gallery: stale thumbnail sticks on card after Stop-at-completion
description: Stop-at-completion on a Cue gallery job. Live repro 2026-06-18 (L4 + RTX 5090, instrumented). The carded STALE-THUMBNAIL did NOT reproduce in 7 hand Stops + a force-race hook (interrupt always discarded output → clean; likely a path changed by MPI-74 P6). TWO adjacent real bugs found in the logs and FIXED+verified: (1) null-tempId swallowed `generation:cancelled` — empty-output/cacheHit/onError branches read tempId from a registry entry already ended by Stop → null → gallery block swallowed the placeholder-teardown event; fixed with a stable opts snapshot. (2) Stuck status-bar timer — a superseded Cue job's complete()/cancel() early-returned without clearing its interval → frozen mm:ss at idle; fixed by hard-stopping the timer in _setIdle(). Files: js/services/generationService.js, js/shell/statusBar.js. The original stale-thumb stays DOCUMENTED-OPEN (see validation.md) — re-open only if it resurfaces in real use. See brief.md + validation.md + research/.
